title: PATH Earnings Dates, Upcoming and Historical UiPath Class A
text: Market Chameleon provides comprehensive PATH earnings calendar with historical dates and upcoming schedule. Upcoming earnings: May 28, 2026 for Q1 FY2027 (quarter ended April 30, 2026). Historical earnings dates show consistent quarterly reporting cadence. Recent earnings history demonstrates: Q4 FY2026 reported March 11, 2026, Q3 FY2026 reported December 3, 2025, Q2 FY2026 reported September 4, 2025, Q1 FY2026 reported May 29, 2025. Earnings surprises tracking: UiPath has demonstrated consistent track record of beating estimates with 100% beat rate over past 2 years on both EPS and revenue metrics. Consensus estimates for May 28 earnings: EPS $0.15, Revenue $397M. Stock response pattern: Recent earnings have driven 5-10% moves on revenue beats and AI progress, despite EPS misses. Macro context: May 28 earnings important catalyst as investors reassess company outlook amid macro uncertainty and sector rotation. Platform shows historical earnings volatility and key drivers of stock movements. Guidance revisions and forward commentary increasingly focused on AI product adoption and agentic automation momentum.
